home.label: Welcome
home.title: Welcome back, {name}
home.description: Your authenticated session is active. Banking features will appear here as the backend expands.
home.descriptionPending: Your account has been created and signed in successfully, but customer access stays limited until an employee approves your profile.
home.summaryDescription: This screen now uses the authenticated user returned by `/api/users/me` instead of the old demo example-users flow.
home.summaryDescriptionPending: Your customer record is waiting for manual approval. Until that happens, this home screen is your only available route.
home.nextDescription: Accounts and transfers stay behind authentication now, and the app restores your session through `/api/auth/refresh` on reload.
home.nextDescriptionPending: Accounts and transfers will unlock after your customer profile is approved. For now, you can stay on this overview while the review is pending.

accounts.label: Accounts
accounts.title: Accounts overview
accounts.description: This is a placeholder page for account balances, account types, and transaction history. The navbar link is already wired through Vue Router and ready for real API data.

transfers.label: Transfers
transfers.title: Transfer funds
transfers.description: This route is ready for a transfer form with source account selection, IBAN fields, amount validation, and a call to the backend transfer endpoint.

login.label: Authentication
login.title: Sign in
login.description: Use your Project Bank credentials to continue to the protected app.
login.registrationSuccess: Account created. Sign in to continue.

register.label: Onboarding
register.title: Create your customer account
register.description: Registration creates an unapproved customer profile first. An employee approval step is still required before account routes unlock.
